hooks.command: bash -c 'if echo "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -qiE "(Utils|Helper|Service|Manager|Calculator)\."; then echo "OOD VIOLATION: File name matches red-flag pattern. Pull this logic onto the domain object instead. See cal/OOD.md." >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'
